task:
Config added. After building and rebooting with make build HOST=matic, you'll need to enroll the TPM2 key on matic:

  sudo systemd-cryptenroll --tpm2-device=auto /dev/nvme0n1p2                                                                                                                   
  
  This is a one-time step. After that, reboots will auto-decrypt without a passphrase. If TPM2 refuses (e.g. after a kernel update), it falls back to the passphrase prompt —  
  just re-enroll after.  add this to README.md too
user_feedback_text:
Config added. After building and rebooting with make build HOST=matic, you'll need to enroll the TPM2 key on matic:

  sudo systemd-cryptenroll --tpm2-device=auto /dev/nvme0n1p2                                                                                                                   
  
  This is a one-time step. After that, reboots will auto-decrypt without a passphrase. If TPM2 refuses (e.g. after a kernel update), it falls back to the passphrase prompt —  
  just re-enroll after.  add this to README.md too
